results.description: bold command wraps selected content in strong markers
bullet-list command toggles unordered list prefixes for selected lines
task-list command prefixes each selected line with unchecked task syntax
task-list command upgrades existing list items in place
Enter continuation inserts or terminates list prefixes deterministically
optional-profile commands emit structural Markdown syntax
front-matter command inserts a YAML front matter scaffold at the top of the document
indent and outdent commands preserve line structure
selection formatting helpers detect inline wrappers and list state
selection normalization and cursor helpers remain stable
editor output round-trips through the renderer core
